title: Remove tty check from images --format

comments.body:
If you redirect stdout to a file, does this cause issues?
```
>/tmp/out
```
Could you check the diff before and after to see if it causes issues.

@rhatdan here's after the fix with file redirect:

```
# buildah images >> /tmp/out.txt

# cat /tmp/out.txt
IMAGE ID             IMAGE NAME                                               CREATED AT             SIZE
6b362a9f73eb         docker.io/docker/whalesay:latest                         May 25, 2015 18:04     258 MB
aca142c1fc8f         localhost/whale-says:latest                              Jun 11, 2018 13:53     288 MB
cc510acfcd70         docker.io/library/fedora:latest                          May 5, 2018 00:58      263 MB
ef15416724f6         docker.io/library/golang:1.7.3                           Nov 8, 2016 14:32      691 MB
3fd9065eaf02         docker.io/library/alpine:latest                          Jan 9, 2018 16:10      4.41 MB
[root@localhost buildah]# 

```

Here's the before with files redirect (different machine).

```
# buildah images >> /tmp/temp.txt
# cat !$
cat /tmp/temp.txt
IMAGE ID             IMAGE NAME                                               CREATED AT             SIZE
3fd9065eaf02         docker.io/library/alpine:latest                          Jan 9, 2018 16:10      4.41 MB
8c811b4aec35         docker.io/library/busybox:latest                         May 23, 2018 17:19     1.36 MB
cc510acfcd70         docker.io/library/fedora:latest                          May 5, 2018 00:58      263 MB

```

I think this is the diff you wanted to see, if not let me know.
What I wanted to see if there was a difference before and after?-
@rhatdan I'll probably hit myself with an oblivious bat after you tell me, but I'm still not sure what you're looking for in "if there was a difference before and after?-"

With the --format flag, this is what I see with redirect before this change:
```
➜  buildah git:(master) ✗ sudo buildah images --format "{{.ID}}" >> blah2
➜  buildah git:(master) ✗ cat blah2
cc510acfcd701a409014118d5f417f0022520802a26c650866b8a9594d75f3a73fd9065eaf02feaf94d68376da52541925650b81698c53c6824d92ff63f98353%
```
After this change:
```
➜  buildah git:(master) ✗ sudo buildah images --format "{{.ID}}" >> blah
➜  buildah git:(master) ✗ cat blah 
cc510acfcd701a409014118d5f417f0022520802a26c650866b8a9594d75f3a7
3fd9065eaf02feaf94d68376da52541925650b81698c53c6824d92ff63f98353
```

The diff:
```
➜  buildah git:(master) ✗ diff blah blah2
1,2c1
< cc510acfcd701a409014118d5f417f0022520802a26c650866b8a9594d75f3a7
< 3fd9065eaf02feaf94d68376da52541925650b81698c53c6824d92ff63f98353
---
> cc510acfcd701a409014118d5f417f0022520802a26c650866b8a9594d75f3a73fd9065eaf02feaf94d68376da52541925650b81698c53c6824d92ff63f98353
\ No newline at end of file
```

@rhatdan is this the difference you were looking for?
Changes LGTM, not sure why I ever added the check.

:pushpin: Commit 7ab7d1e has been approved by `rhatdan`
